title: Genericize QMS-Docs and overhaul qms-cli bootstrap seed

comment:
Pre-review of CR-102 v0.1. No deficiencies found.

FRONTMATTER:
- title: "Genericize QMS-Docs and overhaul qms-cli bootstrap seed"
- revision_summary: "Initial draft" (acceptable for v0.1)

REQUIRED SECTIONS: All 12 per SOP-002 Section 6 present and correctly numbered.

PLACEHOLDER CONTENT: No TBD/TODO/FIXME/XXX found.

CURRENT STATE VERIFIED:
- QMS-Docs: 38 files confirmed, 14 instance-specific references found across 9 files
- seed/sops/: 7 SOP files confirmed (SOP-001 through SOP-007)
- seed/agents/: qa.md only (no tu.md) confirmed
- init.py: default users ["lead", "claude", "qa"] confirmed (no tu)
- init.py: seed_sops() call confirmed at line 323
- SDLC-QMS-RS: EFFECTIVE v18.0 confirmed
- SDLC-QMS-RTM: EFFECTIVE v23.0 confirmed

FILE COUNT VERIFICATION: 38 QMS-Docs total (17 top-level + 9 guides + 12 types), 7 SOP seeds -- all match CR claims.

SCOPE CONSISTENCY: Section 2.3 and Section 7.1 are aligned. All affected files accounted for in both locations.

EI-PHASE MAPPING: 12 EIs map 1:1 to 10 implementation phases plus pre/post-execution commits. All phases covered.

SDLC CONTROLS: Section 7.4 documents branch isolation, write protection, CI verification, PR gate, and submodule update. Section 7.5 Qualified State Continuity table is accurate (RS v18.0, RTM v23.0, CLI-14.0).

TRACEABILITY: CR-101 referenced (verified CLOSED v2.0). Design session references provided.

FORMATTING: Section numbering correct, tables well-formed, no typos detected.

REVIEWER ASSIGNMENT: No TU assignment needed. This CR affects QMS tooling infrastructure and documentation content -- no Flow State application domains impacted. QA-only review is appropriate.

Recommend for pre-approval.

NON-COMPLIANT. Two placeholder content deficiencies found in the execution sections.

SOP-002 Section 7.3 checklist items verified (all pass):
- All 12 EIs show Task Outcome: Pass (no VARs needed)
- SDLC-QMS-RS v19.0 EFFECTIVE (verified)
- SDLC-QMS-RTM v24.0 EFFECTIVE (verified)
- Qualified commit eeaa145 reachable from origin/main (verified via git branch -r --contains)
- Submodule pointer at 6e73be8 (merge commit of PR #19) (verified)
- Code integrated via PR merge: "Merge pull request #19 from whharris917/cr-102/exec" (verified)
- No controlled documents modified per scope, no templates modified
- No VR-flagged EIs

DEFICIENCY 1 - Execution Comments table contains placeholder content (line 339):
Observed: "| [COMMENT] | [PERFORMER] - [DATE] |"
Expected: Either actual execution comments, or an empty table / "No execution comments" statement. Bracketed placeholders are not acceptable.

DEFICIENCY 2 - Execution Summary (Section 11) contains placeholder content (line 345):
Observed: "[EXECUTION_SUMMARY]"
Expected: Per SOP-002 Section 6.11, an overall narrative summarizing the execution after all EIs are complete, including deviations from plan and final assessment. This is a required section.

Both deficiencies must be corrected before this document can be recommended for post-approval.

Both deficiencies from the prior review round have been corrected and verified with evidence:

1. FIXED: Execution Comments table (line 339) now contains actual content: "QA RTM review found 3 deficiencies (frontmatter, RS version ref, req count); all fixed in same cycle | qa/claude - 2026-02-23". No placeholder content.

2. FIXED: Execution Summary (Section 11, line 345) now contains a substantive narrative covering: all 12 EIs completed with no deviations, scope summary (38 genericized docs, TU agent, CLAUDE.md, write guard hook, tu user), test results (677 tests, CI on PR #19), submodule update, and SDLC document status (RS v19.0 and RTM v24.0 EFFECTIVE).

No placeholder content found in full document scan (only hit: JSON array literal on line 163, legitimate content).
